# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
  labels:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---
# Service Account for API Gateway
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices

---
# Service Account for User Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: microservices

---
# Service Account for Order Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices

---
# Service Account for Payment Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices

---
# Service Account for Notification Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices

---
# API Gateway Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "warn"
        config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: "deny"
      labels:
        app: api-gateway
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: api-gateway
      containers:
        - name: api-gateway
          image: api-gateway:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
            - containerPort: 8443
              name: https
            - containerPort: 9090
              name: admin
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10

---
# API Gateway Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
      name: http
    - port: 8443
      targetPort: 8443
      protocol: TCP
      name: https
    - port: 9090
      targetPort: 9090
      protocol: TCP
      name: admin
  selector:
    app: api-gateway

---
# User Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
  labels:
    app: user-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: "deny"
        config.linkerd.io/opaque-ports: "5432"
      labels:
        app: user-service
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: user-service
      containers:
        - name: user-service
          image: user-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8081
              name: http
            - containerPort: 9091
              name: metrics
          env:
            - name: DATABASE_HOST
              value: "postgres.database.svc.cluster.local"
            - name: DATABASE_PORT
              value: "5432"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10

---
# User Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 8081
      targetPort: 8081
      protocol: TCP
      name: http
    - port: 9091
      targetPort: 9091
      protocol: TCP
      name: metrics
  selector:
    app: user-service

---
# Order Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
  labels:
    app: order-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: "deny"
        config.linkerd.io/opaque-ports: "5432"
      labels:
        app: order-service
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: order-service
      containers:
        - name: order-service
          image: order-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8082
              name: http
            - containerPort: 9092
              name: metrics
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10

---
# Order Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 8082
      targetPort: 8082
      protocol: TCP
      name: http
    - port: 9092
      targetPort: 9092
      protocol: TCP
      name: metrics
  selector:
    app: order-service

---
# Payment Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
  labels:
    app: payment-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "150m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "128Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "750m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "512Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: "deny"
        config.linkerd.io/opaque-ports: "5432,6379"
      labels:
        app: payment-service
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: payment-service
      containers:
        - name: payment-service
          image: payment-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8083
              name: http
            - containerPort: 9093
              name: metrics
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "300m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1500m"
              memory: "1Gi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 5
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 10

---
# Payment Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 8083
      targetPort: 8083
      protocol: TCP
      name: http
    - port: 9093
      targetPort: 9093
      protocol: TCP
      name: metrics
  selector:
    app: payment-service

---
# Notification Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
  labels:
    app: notification-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: "deny"
      labels:
        app: notification-service
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: notification-service
      containers:
        - name: notification-service
          image: notification-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8084
              name: http
            - containerPort: 9094
              name: metrics
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "100m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "256Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8084
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8084
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10

---
# Notification Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 8084
      targetPort: 8084
      protocol: TCP
      name: http
    - port: 9094
      targetPort: 9094
      protocol: TCP
      name: metrics
  selector:
    app: notification-service

---
# =====================================================
# SERVER POLICIES - Define which ports accept traffic
# =====================================================

# Server policy for API Gateway - HTTP port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for API Gateway - Admin port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-admin
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: admin
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for User Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for User Service - Metrics
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-metrics
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: metrics
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for Order Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for Order Service - Metrics
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-metrics
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: metrics
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for Payment Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-service-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for Payment Service - Metrics
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-service-metrics
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: metrics
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for Notification Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: notification-service-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for Notification Service - Metrics
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: notification-service-metrics
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  port: metrics
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# =====================================================
# SERVER AUTHORIZATION POLICIES
# Define who can access which services (mTLS-based)
# =====================================================

# Allow API Gateway to receive traffic from any authenticated mesh client
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-allow-meshed
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: api-gateway-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      identities:
        - "*.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# Allow API Gateway to receive unauthenticated traffic (from ingress)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-allow-unauthenticated
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: api-gateway-http
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
      - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
      - cidr: 192.168.0.0/16

---
# Allow only API Gateway to access User Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-service-allow-api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: microservices

---
# Allow Order Service to access User Service (for user validation)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-service-allow-order-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: microservices

---
# Allow only API Gateway and User Service to access Order Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: order-service-allow-api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: order-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: microservices

---
# Allow User Service to access Order Service (for user order history)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: order-service-allow-user-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: order-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: user-service
          namespace: microservices

---
# Allow only Order Service to access Payment Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payment-service-allow-order-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: payment-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: microservices

---
# Allow only API Gateway to access Payment Service (for refunds)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payment-service-allow-api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: payment-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: microservices

---
# Allow Order Service and Payment Service to access Notification Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: notification-service-allow-order-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: notification-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: microservices

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: notification-service-allow-payment-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: notification-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: payment-service
          namespace: microservices

---
# Allow User Service to access Notification Service (for account alerts)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: notification-service-allow-user-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: notification-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: user-service
          namespace: microservices

---
# =====================================================
# METRICS ACCESS - Allow Prometheus to scrape metrics
# =====================================================

# Allow Prometheus to scrape User Service metrics
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-service-metrics-prometheus
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-metrics
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus
          namespace: monitoring

---
# Allow Prometheus to scrape Order Service metrics
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: order-service-metrics-prometheus
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: order-service-metrics
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus
          namespace: monitoring

---
# Allow Prometheus to scrape Payment Service metrics
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payment-service-metrics-prometheus
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: payment-service-metrics
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus
          namespace: monitoring

---
# Allow Prometheus to scrape Notification Service metrics
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: notification-service-metrics-prometheus
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: notification-service-metrics
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus
          namespace: monitoring

---
# Allow Prometheus to scrape API Gateway admin port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-admin-prometheus
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: api-gateway-admin
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus
          namespace: monitoring

---
# =====================================================
# AUTHORIZATION POLICIES (v1alpha1 - HTTPRoute-based)
# Fine-grained route-level authorization
# =====================================================

# HTTPRoute for User Service - read operations
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: user-service-read-routes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: user-service-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/users
          method: GET
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/users
          method: HEAD

---
# HTTPRoute for User Service - write operations
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: user-service-write-routes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: user-service-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/users
          method: POST
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/users
          method: PUT
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/users
          method: PATCH
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/users
          method: DELETE

---
# Authorization policy: Allow API Gateway full access to User Service write routes
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: user-service-write-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: user-service-write-routes
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-tls-api-gateway
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Authorization policy: Allow multiple services read access to User Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: user-service-read-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: user-service-read-routes
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-tls-read-user
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# HTTPRoute for Payment Service - payment processing routes
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: payment-service-process-routes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: payment-service-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/payments/process
          method: POST

---
# HTTPRoute for Payment Service - refund routes
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: payment-service-refund-routes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: payment-service-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/payments/refund
          method: POST

---
# Authorization policy: Only Order Service can process payments
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: payment-process-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: payment-service-process-routes
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-tls-order-service
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Authorization policy: Only API Gateway can initiate refunds
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: payment-refund-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: payment-service-refund-routes
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-tls-api-gateway
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# =====================================================
# MESH TLS AUTHENTICATION RESOURCES
# =====================================================

# MeshTLSAuthentication for API Gateway identity
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mesh-tls-api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "api-gateway.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# MeshTLSAuthentication for Order Service identity
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mesh-tls-order-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "order-service.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# MeshTLSAuthentication for services that can read user data
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mesh-tls-read-user
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "api-gateway.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
    - "order-service.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
    - "notification-service.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# MeshTLSAuthentication for Payment Service identity
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mesh-tls-payment-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "payment-service.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# MeshTLSAuthentication for Notification Service identity
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mesh-tls-notification-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "notification-service.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# MeshTLSAuthentication for all mesh identities in the namespace
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mesh-tls-all-microservices
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "*.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# =====================================================
# NETWORK AUTHENTICATION - For non-mesh traffic
# =====================================================

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: internal-network
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  networks:
    - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
    - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
    - cidr: 192.168.0.0/16

---
# =====================================================
# RETRY AND TIMEOUT CONFIGURATION VIA SERVICE PROFILES
# =====================================================

# Service Profile for User Service
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: user-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  routes:
    - name: GET /api/v1/users
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /api/v1/users(/[^/]+)?
      timeout: 5s
      isRetryable: true
      responseClasses:
        - condition:
            status:
              min: 500
              max: 599
          isFailure: true
    - name: POST /api/v1/users
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /api/v1/users
      timeout: 10s
      isRetryable: false
      responseClasses:
        - condition:
            status:
              min: 500
              max: 599
          isFailure: true
    - name: PUT /api/v1/users
      condition:
        method: PUT
        pathRegex: /api/v1/users/[^/]+
      timeout: 10s
      isRetryable: false
      responseClasses:
        - condition:
            status:
              min: 500
              max: 599
          isFailure: true
    - name: DELETE /api/v1/users
      condition:
        method: DELETE
        pathRegex: /api/v1/users/[^/]+
      timeout: 10s
      isRetryable: false
      responseClasses:
        - condition:
            status:
              min: 500
              max: 599
          isFailure: true
  retryBudget:
    retryRatio: 0.2
    minRetriesPerSecond: 10
    ttl: 10s

---
# Service Profile for Order Service
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: order-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  routes:
    - name: GET /api/v1/orders
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /api/v1/orders(/[^/]+)?
      timeout: 10s
      isRetryable: true
      responseClasses:
        - condition:
            status:
              min: 500
              max: 599
          isFailure: true
    - name: POST /api/v1/orders
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /api/v1/orders
      timeout: 30s
      isRetryable: false
      responseClasses:
        - condition:
            status:
              min: 500
              max: 599
          isFailure: true
    - name: PUT /api/v1/orders
      condition:
        method: PUT
        pathRegex: /api/v1/orders/[^/]+
      timeout: 15s
      isRetryable: false
      responseClasses:
        - condition:
            status:
              min: 500
              max: 599
          isFailure: true
  retryBudget:
    retryRatio: 0.2
    minRetriesPerSecond: 10
    ttl: 10s

---
# Service Profile for Payment Service
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: payment-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  routes:
    - name: POST /api/v1/payments/process
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /api/v1/payments/process
      timeout: 60s
      isRetryable: false
      responseClasses:
        - condition:
            status:
              min: 500
              max: 599
          isFailure: true
    - name: POST /api/v1/payments/refund
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /api/v1/payments/refund
      timeout: 60s
      isRetryable: false
      responseClasses:
        - condition:
            status:
              min: 500
              max: 599
          isFailure: true
    - name: GET /api/v1/payments
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /api/v1/payments(/[^/]+)?
      timeout: 10s
      isRetryable: true
      responseClasses:
        - condition:
            status:
              min: 500
              max: 599
          isFailure: true
  retryBudget:
    retryRatio: 0.1
    minRetriesPerSecond: 5
    ttl: 10s

---
# Service Profile for Notification Service
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: notification-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  routes:
    - name: POST /api/v1/notifications/send
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /api/v1/notifications/send
      timeout: 15s
      isRetryable: true
      responseClasses:
        - condition:
            status:
              min: 500
              max: 599
          isFailure: true
    - name: GET /api/v1/notifications
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /api/v1/notifications(/[^/]+)?
      timeout: 5s
      isRetryable: true
      responseClasses:
        - condition:
            status:
              min: 500
              max: 599
          isFailure: true
  retryBudget:
    retryRatio: 0.3
    minRetriesPerSecond: 10
    ttl: 10s
